children.characters: precedence: download > convert > analyze > research > reply · per-step status via processing.progress (WS/SSE) · retry is idempotent single-claim [§3.3]

children.characters: analyze/OCR depends on the BUILD-NEW Tesseract/PaddleOCR adapter;

children.characters: MeTube completion webhook is BUILD-NEW (poll-only today).

children.characters: and run in the documented precedence, so research can consume downloaded media (ux-flows.md §3).

children.name: Root, thread and pipeline panes each ske
children.characters: Root, thread and pipeline panes each skeleton independently.

children.name: WS/SSE events animate the same pipeline;
children.characters: WS/SSE events animate the same pipeline; UI never blocks on long work.

children.name: Granular retry per step; idempotent sing
children.characters: Granular retry per step; idempotent single-claim — pressing twice never double-processes.

children.name: Double-click / two surfaces racing → toa
children.characters: Double-click / two surfaces racing → toast, no second run (ux-flows.md §3.1).

children.characters: Thread pane shows a quiet empty line, never a blank box.

children.characters: Helix Development attribution is locked — it persists under any white-label.
